analysis.summary: Magento Open Source is a comprehensive PHP-based eCommerce platform that processes online transactions, manages product catalogs, and handles customer interactions through a modular architecture with over 200 integrated modules for storefront and admin functionality.
capabilities: Processes eCommerce transactions and order management (app/code/Magento/Sales/)
Manages product catalogs with inventory tracking (app/code/Magento/Catalog/, app/code/Magento/CatalogInventory/)
Handles customer registration and authentication (app/code/Magento/Customer/)
Provides admin dashboard and backend management (app/code/Magento/Backend/)
Processes payment transactions through multiple gateways (app/code/Magento/Payment/)
Manages content pages and blocks (app/code/Magento/Cms/)
Handles advanced search functionality (app/code/Magento/AdvancedSearch/, app/code/Magento/CatalogSearch/)
Supports multi-store and multi-currency operations (app/code/Magento/Store/, app/code/Magento/Directory/)
Manages shipping and tax calculations (app/code/Magento/Shipping/, app/code/Magento/Tax/)
Provides import/export capabilities for product data (app/code/Magento/ImportExport/)
Handles message queuing for asynchronous operations (app/code/Magento/AsynchronousOperations/, app/code/Magento/Amqp/)
Manages user roles and permissions (app/code/Magento/Authorization/, app/code/Magento/User/)
Processes analytics and reporting (app/code/Magento/Analytics/, app/code/Magento/Reports/)
technical_stack: XML for configuration and layout (etc/ directories)

technical_facts: Processes eCommerce transactions and order management (app/code/Magento/Sales/)
Manages product catalogs with inventory tracking (app/code/Magento/Catalog/, app/code/Magento/CatalogInventory/)
Handles customer registration and authentication (app/code/Magento/Customer/)
Provides admin dashboard and backend management (app/code/Magento/Backend/)

Manages content pages and blocks (app/code/Magento/Cms/)
Handles advanced search functionality (app/code/Magento/AdvancedSearch/, app/code/Magento/CatalogSearch/)
Supports multi-store and multi-currency operations (app/code/Magento/Store/, app/code/Magento/Directory/)
Manages shipping and tax calculations (app/code/Magento/Shipping/, app/code/Magento/Tax/)
Provides import/export capabilities for product data (app/code/Magento/ImportExport/)

architecture_patterns: Concurrency: synchronous with asynchronous message queue processing via RabbitMQ/AMQP for bulk operations
deployment_options: CI/CD: GitHub Actions (implied from repository structure)

functional_dna.logic_archetype_evidence: Manages complex eCommerce workflows including order processing (app/code/Magento/Sales/), customer sessions (app/code/Magento/Customer/), inventory tracking (app/code/Magento/CatalogInventory/), and multi-store operations requiring state persistence across transactions
functional_dna.data_contract_evidence: Uses XML schemas for configuration (etc/ directories), db_schema.xml files throughout modules for database structure, and REST/SOAP API endpoints with defined schemas (webapi.xml files)
functional_dna.core_algorithmic_evidence: Primary operations involve Create, Read, Update, Delete for products (app/code/Magento/Catalog/), orders (app/code/Magento/Sales/), customers (app/code/Magento/Customer/), and content management (app/code/Magento/Cms/)
functional_dna.concurrency_evidence: eCommerce transactions require ACID compliance for order processing, payment handling (app/code/Magento/Payment/), inventory management (app/code/Magento/CatalogInventory/), and financial calculations (app/code/Magento/Tax/, app/code/Magento/Shipping/)
functional_dna.repurposing_reasoning: High modularity with 200+ modules and well-defined APIs makes components reusable, but deep eCommerce domain coupling (sales, shipping, tax calculations) limits direct application to other domains without significant modification

evidence_claims.evidence: composer.json files throughout the codebase specify PHP version requirements
db_schema.xml files throughout modules define database structure

evidence_claims.claim: Provides REST and SOAP API interfaces
evidence_claims.evidence: webapi.xml files define REST API endpoints at /rest/V1/* and SOAP endpoints at /soap/V1/*
app/code/Magento/AsynchronousOperations/ and app/code/Magento/Amqp/ modules for message queuing
app/code/Magento/AdvancedSearch/ and app/code/Magento/CatalogSearch/ modules with Elasticsearch integration (app/code/Magento/Elasticsearch/)

information_gaps: Specific database schema definitions for core entities
Detailed API rate limiting and throttling policies
Security implementation details beyond authentication methods
Specific version compatibility matrices for dependencies
